title: [Nyessem, Portal Room]
description: A tall white stone portal lined with jeweled runes sits on a white stone pedestal at one end of the room.  Set at its apex is a large rune-etched diamond.  Descending from the portal, a semicircle of white marble stairs leads to a recessed path.  Flanking this path, the walls glow with a shimmering pearlescence that limits the need for additional light.  Some bright violet-hued banners trimmed with silver threads line the length of the room, matching the silver-hued cloth pillows arranged around the room.  Overhead, some gem-studded carved stone lanterns line the way north and onward.
